subject: usb: dwc3: pci: prevent memory leak in dwc3_pci_probe

features.path_conditions: When platform_device_alloc has succeeded and any subsequent step (e.g. platform_device_add_properties) fails, the allocated platform_device must be released via platform_device_put before returning the error; early returns on error paths after acquisition must release.
features.fit_test_reasoning: Target API platform_device_alloc returns a reference-counted platform_device that must be released; post-op platform_device_put is a cleanup function (not data transformation); missing it on the error path leaks the device (refcount/memory); follows acquire->use->release semantics.

predicates.name: bug_site
predicates.signature: predicate bug_site(Function f, FunctionCall acq, ReturnStmt r)

plan.assembly: from Function f, FunctionCall acq, ReturnStmt r where bug_site(f, acq, r) select r, msg, acq, "acquisition site"
